prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
(register_validation_case primary_itinerary_1)
(register_validation_case companion_itinerary_1)
(register_validation_case fare_rule_case_1)
(register_validation_case fare_rule_case_2)
(attach_document_to_case primary_itinerary_1 doc_instance_passport_1)
(match_case_with_doc_requirement primary_itinerary_1 doc_type_requirement_passport)
(confirm_document_verification primary_itinerary_1 doc_type_requirement_passport)
(satisfy_jurisdiction_primary_requirement primary_itinerary_1 jurisdiction_country_1 doc_type_requirement_passport)
(assign_verifying_authority_to_case primary_itinerary_1 authority_border_office_1)
(apply_authority_verification_to_primary_itinerary primary_itinerary_1 jurisdiction_country_1 authority_border_office_1)
(unassign_verifying_authority_from_case primary_itinerary_1 authority_border_office_1)
(attach_document_to_case companion_itinerary_1 doc_instance_visa_1)
(match_case_with_doc_requirement companion_itinerary_1 doc_type_requirement_passport)
(confirm_document_verification companion_itinerary_1 doc_type_requirement_passport)
(satisfy_companion_jurisdiction_primary_requirement companion_itinerary_1 jurisdiction_profile_country_1 doc_type_requirement_passport)

(apply_authority_verification_to_companion_itinerary companion_itinerary_1 jurisdiction_profile_country_1 authority_border_office_1)
(unassign_verifying_authority_from_case companion_itinerary_1 authority_border_office_1)
(assemble_fare_candidate primary_itinerary_1 companion_itinerary_1 jurisdiction_country_1 jurisdiction_profile_country_1 fare_option_economy_1)
(unmatch_case_doc_requirement companion_itinerary_1 doc_type_requirement_passport)
(match_case_with_doc_requirement primary_itinerary_1 doc_type_requirement_passport)
(prepare_fare_option_for_template_matching fare_option_economy_1 primary_itinerary_1 doc_type_requirement_passport)
(propagate_eligibility_to_primary_itinerary primary_itinerary_1 fare_option_economy_1)
(propagate_eligibility_to_companion_itinerary companion_itinerary_1 fare_option_economy_1)
(attach_document_to_case fare_rule_case_1 doc_instance_certificate_1)
(unmatch_case_doc_requirement primary_itinerary_1 doc_type_requirement_passport)
(match_case_with_doc_requirement fare_rule_case_1 doc_type_requirement_passport)
(confirm_document_verification fare_rule_case_1 doc_type_requirement_passport)
(apply_document_template_to_fare_rule fare_rule_case_1 document_template_passport_scan_1 fare_option_economy_1)
(finalize_fare_rule_template_matching fare_rule_case_1 document_template_passport_scan_1 fare_option_economy_1 doc_type_requirement_passport)
(assign_endorsement_to_fare_rule_case fare_rule_case_1 endorsement_refund)
(assign_verifying_authority_to_case fare_rule_case_1 authority_border_office_1)
(assign_endorsement_and_authority_to_fare_rule fare_rule_case_1 endorsement_refund authority_border_office_1 document_template_passport_scan_1 fare_option_economy_1)
(attach_policy_exception_to_fare_rule_case fare_rule_case_1 policy_exception_emergency_dispensation_1)
(finalize_rule_scoring_plain fare_rule_case_1 policy_exception_emergency_dispensation_1 document_template_passport_scan_1 fare_option_economy_1)
(record_provisional_eligibility_for_fare_rule fare_rule_case_1)
(consume_certificate_for_case fare_rule_case_1 certificate_health_pass doc_type_requirement_passport)
(finalize_eligibility_and_release_resources_fare_rule_case fare_rule_case_1 doc_instance_certificate_1 certificate_health_pass)
(detach_policy_exception_from_fare_rule_case fare_rule_case_1 policy_exception_emergency_dispensation_1)
(unassign_endorsement_from_fare_rule_case fare_rule_case_1 endorsement_refund)
(unassign_verifying_authority_from_case fare_rule_case_1 authority_border_office_1)
(unmatch_case_doc_requirement fare_rule_case_1 doc_type_requirement_passport)
(match_case_with_doc_requirement primary_itinerary_1 doc_type_requirement_passport)
(consume_certificate_for_case primary_itinerary_1 certificate_health_pass doc_type_requirement_passport)
(finalize_eligibility_and_release_resources_primary_itinerary primary_itinerary_1 doc_instance_passport_1 certificate_health_pass)
(unmatch_case_doc_requirement primary_itinerary_1 doc_type_requirement_passport)
(match_case_with_doc_requirement companion_itinerary_1 doc_type_requirement_passport)
(consume_certificate_for_case companion_itinerary_1 certificate_health_pass doc_type_requirement_passport)
(finalize_eligibility_and_release_resources_companion_itinerary companion_itinerary_1 doc_instance_visa_1 certificate_health_pass)
(unmatch_case_doc_requirement companion_itinerary_1 doc_type_requirement_passport)
(attach_document_to_case fare_rule_case_2 doc_instance_certificate_1)
(match_case_with_doc_requirement fare_rule_case_2 doc_type_requirement_passport)

(assign_endorsement_to_fare_rule_case fare_rule_case_2 endorsement_refund)
(assign_verifying_authority_to_case fare_rule_case_2 authority_border_office_1)
(assign_endorsement_and_authority_to_fare_rule fare_rule_case_2 endorsement_refund authority_border_office_1 document_template_visa_scan_1 fare_option_economy_1)
(attach_policy_exception_to_fare_rule_case fare_rule_case_2 policy_exception_emergency_dispensation_1)
(finalize_rule_scoring_plain fare_rule_case_2 policy_exception_emergency_dispensation_1 document_template_visa_scan_1 fare_option_economy_1)
(record_provisional_eligibility_for_fare_rule fare_rule_case_2)
(consume_certificate_for_case fare_rule_case_2 certificate_health_pass doc_type_requirement_passport)
(finalize_eligibility_and_release_resources_fare_rule_case fare_rule_case_2 doc_instance_certificate_1 certificate_health_pass)
message.reasoning:
The problem involves validating eligibility for fare rules with primary_itinerary_1, companion_itinerary_1, and two fare_rule_cases: fare_rule_case_1 and fare_rule_case_2. The goal is to confirm eligibility for all three: primary_itinerary_1, companion_itinerary_1, fare_rule_case_1, and fare_rule_case_2.


## Evaluating Eligibility Rules  
- The task is to validate eligibility for fare rules involving primary_itinerary_1, companion_itinerary_1, and two fare_rule_cases: fare_rule_case_1 and fare_rule_case_2.  
- The goal is to ensure all components—primary_itinerary_1, companion_itinerary_1, fare_rule_case_1, and fare_rule_case_2—are eligible under the given rules.

## Evaluating Eligibility Rules  
- To confirm eligibility, each case—primary_itinerary_1, companion_itinerary_1, fare_rule_case_1, fare_rule_case_2—must be registered and have documents attached.  
- Eligibility requires matching documents to case requirements, verifying them, and consuming certificates, with shared fare_option_economy_1 linking the fare_rule_cases.  

## Processing Case Registration  
- Start by registering all cases, as registration is a prerequisite and none are currently confirmed eligible.  
- Registration involves register_validation_case, ensuring each case meets preconditions like not being registered or confirmed eligible.  

## Managing Document Attachment  
- Each case needs a document attached, but with only three documents and four cases, sharing or reusing documents may be necessary.  
- Attaching a document consumes document_available, and each case must match with doc_type_requirement_passport to proceed.  

## Handling Document Matching  
- Matching a case to a document requires the document type to be available, but this availability is consumed after matching one case.  
- To match multiple cases, unmatching may be needed to release document_type_available, allowing other cases to proceed.

## Assessing Document Verification  
- Document verification is required for primary and companion cases, with case_documents_verified as a precondition for further steps.  
- Verification enables linking evidence, setting checks_completed, and consuming evidence_available temporarily.

## Exploring Assembly Paths  
- Assembling fare candidates can follow different paths: no restrictions require checks_completed, jurisdiction_document_match_flag, and requirement satisfaction for both primary and companion.  
- Alternative paths, like assemble_fare_candidate_with_primary_evidence, require jurisdiction_evidence_flag, profile links, and specific satisfaction conditions, setting selected and linking profiles.

## Assembling Fare Candidates  
- After getting checks_completed and satisfied, assemble_fare_candidate links fare_option and sets candidate_selected, potentially setting restriction flags.  
- Paths vary based on restrictions, such as assemble_fare_candidate_with_primary_evidence, requiring specific flags and links for profile selection.  

## Preparing Fare Rule Cases  
- Register fare_rule_cases, attach documents, and match doc_type, ensuring case_documents_verified for further steps.  
- Prepare fare_option_for_template_matching using primary, setting the stage for template application to fare_rule cases.  

## Applying Document Templates  
- Apply_document_template_to_fare_rule requires case_documents_verified, associated_fare_option, and template_avail, consuming resources and setting matches_option.  
- Finalize_fare_rule_template_matching or apply_template_and_fare_class depends on primary_restriction, with different conditions like fare_rule_has_assigned_fare_class.  

## Finalizing Rule Scoring  
- Assign_endorsement_and_authority_to_fare_rule requires template_matching_complete and assigned_endorsement, setting endorsement_assigned based on restrictions.  
- Finalize_rule_scoring_plain or paths with flags (primary, companion, or both) set complete and potentially concession_attached, leading to scoring completion.  

## Managing Issuing Agencies  
- Apply_alternative_issuing_agency requires verified documents, agency_available, and assigned_agency, but availability varies by case.  
- For case2, carrier_office_1 isn't available, potentially blocking alternative agency application despite prior assignment.

## Registering Cases and Documents  
- Register four cases early: primary_itinerary_1, companion_itinerary_1, fare_rule_case_1, and fare_rule_case_2.  
- Process primary documents by attaching doc_instance_passport_1, matching doc_type, and verifying, ensuring jurisdiction satisfaction.  

## Verifying Itineraries  
- Assign and apply verifying authority (authority_border_office_1) to primary_itinerary_1, then unassign to release, completing checks.  
- Repeat for companion_itinerary_1 with doc_instance_visa_1, ensuring both itineraries are checks_completed and requirements satisfied.  

## Managing Document Matching  
- Unmatch primary_itinerary_1 from doc_type_requirement_passport to free it for companion use, preserving jurisdiction flags.  
- Confirm flags like document_flag_juris and profile_primary_satisfied remain set, supporting later steps.  

## Assembling Fare Options  
- Assemble fare_candidate with primary_itinerary_1, companion_itinerary_1, and fare_option_economy_1, setting candidate_selected and links.  
- Prepare fare_option_economy_1 for template matching, ensuring case_matches primary for further processing.

## Finalizing Fare Cases  
- Consume certificate for fare_rule_case_1 using certificate_health_pass, setting it as consumed and linking to the case, making the certificate unavailable.  
- Finalize eligibility and release resources for fare_rule_case_1, confirming the case, making the document and certificate available again without affecting the match.  

## Managing Certificate Consumption  
- Unmatch fare_rule_case_1 from doc_type_requirement_passport to free it, then rematch primary_itinerary_1 to enable certificate consumption.  
- Consume certificate for primary_itinerary_1 with certificate_health_pass, linking it and setting as unavailable, then finalize eligibility and release resources, confirming the case.  

## Handling Companion Cases  
- Unmatch primary_itinerary_1 to free doc_type_requirement_passport, then match it to companion_itinerary_1 for certificate consumption.  
- Consume certificate for companion_itinerary_1 with certificate_health_pass, finalizing eligibility and releasing resources to confirm the case.

## Processing Fare Rules  
- Fare1 and fare2 follow similar paths without assigning fare_class, lacking restrictions and concessions.  
- Endorsements and verifying authorities are unassigned after fare1, making resources available for fare2 processing.  

## Assigning Resources for Fare2  
- Assign endorsement_refund and authority_border_office_1 to fare_rule_case_2, linking with document_template_visa_scan_1 and fare_option_economy_1.  
- Attach policy_exception_emergency_dispensation_1 to fare_rule_case_2, finalizing plain scoring and recording provisional eligibility.  

## Managing Certificates for Fare2  
- Consume certificate_health_pass for fare_rule_case_2, finalizing eligibility and releasing resources, confirming fare2.  
- Ensure doc_instance_certificate_1 is available again after fare1, supporting fare2 attachment in sequence.  

## Reviewing Process Completeness  
- Primary, companion, fare1, and fare2 are all confirmed, meeting goals without needing scored aggregates or concessions.  
- Propagation occurred before fare1 document attachment, ensuring itineraries were prepared, with no issues from unused alternative paths.

## Updating Resource Assignments  
- Unmatch companion_itinerary_1 from doc_type_requirement_passport, then match primary_itinerary_1 for preparation.  
- Prepare fare_option_economy_1 for template matching with primary_itinerary_1 and doc_type_requirement_passport.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
